name: Pixiewps
description: Offline WPS PIN recovery using the pixie-dust attack. Tool: https://github.com/wiire-a/pixiewps. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #93 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Pixiewps output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
